{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Crushing Black Palm
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Crushing Black Palm]] is a technique that combines a [[Forger echo technique]] and an [[Enforcer]] attack technique.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5">''Uncrowned'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Crushing Black Palm]] can produce multiple strikes at once from a single palm strike.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
